summary: Do not ship H1 as-is: the discuss-automation setup/verify hook installs the skill into the fitting’s own working directory, so verify can pass while the operative never gets the skill in the composition’s `.claude/skills` tree.

findings.title: Setup/verify hook is self-consistent but installs the skill in the wrong place
findings.recommendation: Do not use a relative `.claude/...` destination from the fitting working directory. Resolve the composition/root Claude directory explicitly and have both `setup` and `verify` target that absolute location; otherwise the runner can report success while the operative cannot load `discuss-automation`. Recheck the paired verify in `fittings/seed/discuss-automation/apm.yml:23-25` after fixing the install path.
